mapper.sql: pgeo.id, pgeo.permission_group_id, pgeo.excluded_object_id, pgeo.object_type, pgeo.effective_at, pgeo.expires_at, pgeo.create_by, pgeo.create_time, pgeo.update_by, pgeo.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT pgeo.id, pgeo.excluded_object_id, pgeo.object_type, CASE pgeo.object_type WHEN 'user' THEN '用户' WHEN 'org' THEN '组织' WHEN 'station' THEN '驻地' WHEN 'position' THEN '岗位' ELSE pgeo.object_type END AS object_type_name, pgeo.excluded_object_id AS object_id, CASE pgeo.object_type WHEN 'user' THEN (SELECT u.user_name FROM po_users u WHERE u.user_id = pgeo.excluded_object_id) WHEN 'org' THEN (SELECT o.org_name FROM po_organization o WHERE o.org_id = pgeo.excluded_object_id) ELSE NULL END AS object_name, pgeo.effective_at, pgeo.expires_at, pgeo.create_time, pgeo.create_by FROM permission_group_excluded_objects pgeo WHERE pgeo.permission_group_id = #{permissionGroupId} ORDER BY pgeo.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO permission_group_excluded_objects (id, permission_group_id, excluded_object_id, object_type, effective_at, expires_at, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.permissionGroupId}, #{item.excludedObjectId}, #{item.objectType}, #{item.effectiveAt}, #{item.expiresAt}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
